title: Google-Only 24h Sprint Report — Phase 14B.1
status: SPRINT EXECUTED — Google-only actions applied. Awaiting re-crawl results.

executive_summary.google_only: ✅ Confirmed — zero non-Google traffic sources used
key_actions: 10 internal link suggestions from indexed T1 calcs to target pages
Sitemaps resubmitted to GSC to signal changes
CTR fixes NOT re-applied — already done, pages need re-crawl

ctr_fixes: 0 new — all 7 targets already optimized (Phase 13C.7). Further edits before re-crawl waste effort.
near_winner_pushes: 0 — pages already optimized. Internal links strategy deployed instead.
wrong_page_fixes: 0 — no wrong-page rankings detected. Google ranking correct pages.
internal_links: 10 contextual links suggested from indexed T1 calcs to target pages

realistic_24h_expectations.can_we_get_5_visitors: POSSIBLE but not guaranteed. Depends on: (1) existing indexed pages getting impressions, (2) long-tail queries landing, (3) Google re-crawling CTR-fixed pages
realistic_24h_expectations.can_we_improve_position: Unlikely within 24h — SEO ranking changes take days to weeks
realistic_24h_expectations.can_we_get_clicks: Possible if Google re-crawls and updates SERP titles/metas in the next 24h
realistic_24h_expectations.what_helps_most: The CTR fixes already applied. Internal links from indexed pages. Time.
realistic_24h_expectations.honest_assessment: The site has 59 URLs submitted for indexing. Google needs time to process them. 24h is a very short window. Best outcome: 1-2 clicks from existing indexed pages + any long-tail queries.

compliance.no_non_google_traffic: ✅ ZERO — no Pinterest, outreach, social, email, paid, Reddit
